task_completion.description: Verify that the agent selected the correct CSV file for import.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a file picker or import wizard screen in Jolly Lobby Track showing 'interns.csv' from the Documents folder selected as the source file.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Full Name' CSV field is mapped to the 'Name' application field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the field mapping screen in the import wizard. The CSV column 'Full Name' should be explicitly matched or aligned with the destination field 'Name'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Dept' CSV field is mapped to the 'Department' application field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the field mapping screen in the import wizard. The CSV column 'Dept' should be explicitly matched or aligned with the destination field 'Department'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Email Address' CSV field is mapped to the 'Email' application field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the field mapping screen in the import wizard. The CSV column 'Email Address' should be explicitly matched or aligned with the destination field 'Email'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 5 intern records have been successfully imported into the Host/Employee list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main Host/Employee list in Jolly Lobby Track. It must display the 5 new interns (Alice Intern, Bob Intern, Charlie Intern, Dana Intern, Evan Intern) along with their corresponding emails.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Jolly Lobby Track GUI import feature rather than terminal commands or scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jolly Lobby Track application's import wizard and dialogs, not a terminal window executing database or file manipulation commands.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent imported the CSV rather than manually typing the records one by one.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of the import wizard/mapping screens. The agent should not be seen manually clicking 'Add New' and typing the names and emails into individual form fields.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with Jolly Lobby Track and not a generic spreadsheet program.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final list of employees and the import process must be within the Jolly Lobby Track application interface, not LibreOffice Calc or another text/spreadsheet editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The CSV file to import is located at '/home/ga/Documents/interns.csv'. The expected 5 imported records must have the following names: Alice Intern, Bob Intern, Charlie Intern, Dana Intern, Evan Intern. Their corresponding emails are: alice.intern@example.com, bob.intern@example.com, charlie.intern@example.com, dana.intern@example.com, evan.intern@example.com.
